title: Trivo's Talents
description: Players receive 3 unique talents upon joining the world, gain more talents by advancing through the game!
body:
## **Ever wanted unique vanilla-style perks with your friends?**
![Talents Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b680e1b2e289f4fbd8995ca46232df92e754777c.png)
**Adds 12 unique talents to your world! Start with 3 random talents that you need to discover, you can learn more talents by advancing through the game, for each advancement you get you have a chance to get a new talent that increases as you get more advancements.**

### **Talents:**
- **Fighting** (Strength II while holding a sword)
- **Mining** (Haste II while holding a pickaxe or shovel)
- **Foraging** (Haste II while holding an axe or hoe)
- **Archery** (2x faster bow charge speed)
- **Farming** (Replenish grown crops on harvest)
- **Sneaking** (Invisiblity while crouching)
- **Swimming** (Dolphin's Grace while swimming)
- **Running** (Speed II while running)
- **Jumping** (Jump Boost II while crouching)
- **Endurance** (Resistance with any armor piece & Resistance II with full armor & shield)
- **Riding** (Speed II & Jump Boost II on mount while riding)
- **Healthy** (Health Boost II with full hunger)


[[Note: on the newest version 1.21.8 there are a couple of changes like new */talents* commands and changes with some effect durations and requirements, most notable change is the way you get talents, each talent now is a part of one of the five advancement categories, for example farming is in the husbandry category, to get it if you didn't start with it you need to complete some advancements and you have a chance of getting it alongside other talents in that category, which actually makes the chance to get higher for some talents, */talents info getting* to see them all.]]
